title: Prof Uche Uwaleke Colloquium on Capital Market
description: Photo Caption: L-R: Senator Aminu Abbas (Chairman Senate Committee on Science & Technology); Prof Kitso Ngarubi (Deputy Vice Chancellor Nasarawa State University Keffi; Prof Uche Uwaleke (Prof of
html: Photo Caption: L-R: Senator Aminu Abbas (Chairman Senate Committee on Science & Technology); Prof Kitso Ngarubi (Deputy Vice Chancellor Nasarawa State University Keffi; Prof Uche Uwaleke (Prof of Capital Market and Honoree); Senator Osita Izunaso (Chairman Senate Committee on Capital Market), and Senator Peter Jiya (Vice Chairman, Senate Committee on Capital Market) at the Prof Uche Uwaleke (PUU) Colloquium on Capital Market held on Monday February 23rd at the Yaradua Centre Abuja
